name: Birch Johnson
abstract: Birch "Crimson Slide" Johnson (born 1953 in Dublin, Georgia) is an American trombonist. He is a first call studio trombonist, Emmy-nominated composer, producer and songwriter based in New York City.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck Quartet/ Woody Herman and the Young Thundering Herd
Kool Jazz Festival: Benny Carter and Illinois Jacquet
Kool Jazz Festival: Mel Torme and George Shearing
